visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt and a bright blue Adidas tracksuit jacket, films herself in a selfie perspective. She is inside a massive, brightly lit modern indoor stadium with thousands of spectators. She smiles broadly and points toward the field. (2) The camera pans to show the vast expanse of the Taipei Dome, filled with fans mostly wearing yellow jerseys. The field is bright green under intense stadium lights. (3) The woman is shown in a different indoor setting, likely a concourse or hallway, speaking directly to the camera while holding her phone. She appears animated and excited. (4) A montage sequence shows various food and drink items held by the woman: a yellow Lipton peach oolong tea carton, a small bag of snacks, and a white protein shake bottle. She is seated in the stadium stands. (5) The woman wears clear plastic gloves and eats a piece of fried chicken from a BHC-branded box. She also eats a golden-brown cheese ball, showing the melting cheese inside. (6) Back in the stands, the woman cheers wildly, her mouth wide open in a shout, as the crowd around her jumps and waves. Yellow light sticks are visible in the background. (7) The stadium's large LED screen displays the word 'VICTORY' and 'TAICHUNG' in bold orange text. (8) At night, five female performers in yellow and blue outfits (ITZY) are seen dancing on the stadium field under spotlights. The audience is a sea of colorful glowing light sticks. (9) Finally, the woman is seen back at home or in a hotel room, wearing a pink and orange devil-ear headband. She drinks water from a clear bottle and looks exhausted but happy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV. [Subtitle]: 韓國人第一次去大巨蛋看賽. [Subtitle]: A Korean visiting Taipei Dome for the first time. (2) [Subtitle]: 今天人生第一次去大巨蛋. (3) [Subtitle]: 其實原本為了看 ITZY 去的. (4) [Subtitle]: (對於棒球無知). (5) [Subtitle]: 原來台灣這樣應援喔. (6) [Subtitle]: (假裝是粉絲??). [Variety]: 中信兄弟. (7) [Subtitle]: 最期待吃東西. (8) [Subtitle]: (喝起來). (9) [Subtitle]: 好神奇. (10) [Subtitle]: 不忘記補充蛋白質 (是韓國奶昔). (11) [Subtitle]: BHC炸雞來了... (12) [Subtitle]: 只有我太認真吃東西嗎... (13) [Subtitle]: 來棒球場就要吃炸雞! (14) [Subtitle]: 起司球. (15) [Subtitle]: (滿足的眼神). (16) [Subtitle]: 前面到第8局都還是0分欸. (17) [Subtitle]: 可是呢. (18) [Subtitle]: 結果第9局突然... (19) [Subtitle]: 一直狂打安打中⚾️. (20) [Subtitle]: 原來棒球這麼好看喔? ⚾️. (21) [Subtitle]: 最後一直安打. (22) [Subtitle]: 直接逆轉贏球. (23) [Subtitle]: 好像看完一部電影欸哈哈哈. (24) [Logo]: VICTORY TAICHUNG. (25) [Subtitle]: 最後 ITZY 的表演😍. (26) [Subtitle]: 好像來了演唱會😍. (27) [Subtitle]: 她們唱了七首歌左右!. (28) [Subtitle]: 好幸福唷～～～. (29) [Subtitle]: 看賽唯一的缺點會有後遺症.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character, several performers on field, and a large crowd of spectators in the stadium.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight brown hair. She initially wears a white top under a bright blue Adidas track jacket with white stripes. Later, she is seen with a pink and orange animal-ear headband.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary setting is the interior of the Taipei Dome, characterized by its massive domed ceiling, bright green baseball field, and tiered seating filled with fans in yellow. Secondary locations include a domestic indoor room with a bed and a plain wall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy K-pop track ('Not Shy' by ITZY) featuring a strong electronic beat and bright synthesizers. A female voice speaks excitedly in Korean, her pitch high and tone animated. (2) Faint crowd cheering and stadium atmosphere are audible beneath the music. The speaker's arousal increases, her speech becoming faster as she describes the stadium entrance. (3) A sharp transition occurs as the speaker reacts to seeing the performers; the vocal intensity peaks. The BGM continues without interruption, maintaining a consistent 126 BPM tempo. (4) Brief incidental sounds of crinkling plastic and soft eating sounds are mixed in during the food montage, though the music remains the dominant layer. (5) A massive roar from the crowd occurs alongside an upbeat section of the song, marking a home run or hit. The speaker's voice becomes strained with excitement. (6) The video concludes with the music fading slightly as the speaker's tone shifts to a more relaxed, whispered, yet still joyful state indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Context -> Experience (Food & Game) -> Climax (Victory & Performance) -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and share the high-energy experience of a Korean vlogger attending her first baseball game at the Taipei Dome, highlighting the unique cheering culture, the food available at the stadium, and the special performance by the K-pop group ITZY.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While brands like Adidas, BHC, and Lipton are visible, they appear as organic parts of the vlogger's experience rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses popular K-pop music as a rhythmic anchor, successfully blending the excitement of professional sports with fan-culture vlogging. The high information density from on-screen text and fast cuts is typical of trending social media content.
